name: Tenki Cloud Sandbox
description: OpenClaw sandbox backend that runs tool execution in remote Tenki Cloud microVM sessions.

authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.help: Tenki API token. Prefer the TENKI_AUTH_TOKEN or TENKI_API_KEY environment variable over storing it in config.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Tenki API endpoint override. Defaults to the SDK's TENKI_API_ENDPOINT / TENKI_API_URL environment fallback.

image.label: Base Image
image.help: Base image id for created sandbox sessions. Omit for the Tenki default image.

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workspaceRoot.help: Absolute path inside the session used for per-scope workspaces.

cliCommand.label: Tenki CLI Command
cliCommand.help: Local tenki CLI command used for interactive exec passthrough.

idleTimeoutMinutes.label: Idle Timeout Minutes
idleTimeoutMinutes.help: Terminate the session after this many idle minutes.

tags.label: Session Tags
tags.help: Extra tags attached to created sessions.
